html:
2026-0610
2026-06-12FINExcise Tax ActRegulations Amending the New Harmonized Value-added Tax System Regulations, No. 2 (Ontario)Regulations Amending the New Harmonized Value-added Tax System Regulations, No. 2 (Ontario) in order to (1) implement temporary enhancements to the existing Ontario Harmonized Sales Tax (HST) New Housing Rebate and Ontario New Residential Rental Property Rebate for qualifying new housing in Ontario based on the province’s eligibility criteria; and (2) provide relief of the full 8% provincial portion of the HST on qualifying new homes.Registration: SOR/2026-0130 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: Regulations Amending the New Harmonized Value-added Tax System Regulations, No. 2 (Ontario)
precis: Regulations Amending the New Harmonized Value-added Tax System Regulations, No. 2 (Ontario) in order to (1) implement temporary enhancements to the existing Ontario Harmonized Sales Tax (HST) New Housing Rebate and Ontario New Residential Rental Property Rebate for qualifying new housing in Ontario based on the province’s eligibility criteria; and (2) provide relief of the full 8% provincial portion of the HST on qualifying new homes.
